item.text: {"status":"success","repo_checked":true,"worktree_before":"Clean: git status --short produced no output before edits; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree returned true.","task_contract":{"goal":"Normalize receipt references to RCPT-#### while keeping the last four digits of the numeric sequence.","allowed_paths":["src/normalizeReceipt.js"],"forbidden_paths":["README.md","task-contract.json","package.json","test/"],"verify_command":"npm test"},"files_changed":["src/normalizeReceipt.js"],"tests":[{"command":"pwd","exit_code":0,"result":"<temp-repo>"},{"command":"git status --short","exit_code":0,"result":"No output before edits; worktree clean."},{"command":"git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree","exit_code":0,"result":"true"},{"command":"npm test","exit_code":0,"result":"4 tests passed; 0 failed."},{"command":"git diff --stat","exit_code":0,"result":"src/normalizeReceipt.js | 2 +-; 1 file changed, 1 insertion, 1 deletion."},{"command":"git diff -- src/normalizeReceipt.js","exit_code":0,"result":"Changed digits.slice(0, 4) to digits.slice(-4)."},{"command":"git status --short","exit_code":0,"result":"M src/normalizeReceipt.js"}],"diff_summary":"Updated src/normalizeReceipt.js so receipt normalization keeps the last four digits of the extracted numeric sequence and pads to RCPT-####.","final_note":"No remaining limitation."}
